subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-02-04
subcodes.first_line: Nearly fifty of us were together in a spirit of joy and fragrance; with thee am I well pleased [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قریب پنجاه امری بروح و ریحان با هم بودیم از شما خیلی راضیم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
